effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, if your Order Zone has two or more cards, you may draw a card. If you do, choose a card from your hand, and put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: Those arms can split the earth, and swallow civilizations.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Welstra " in its card name, COST  [retire this unit], search your deck or drop for up to one "Heavy Strike Cannon Fortress, Freischutz" or "Mobile Fortress of Obliteration, Freischutz Maximum", reveal it and put it into your hand, and if you searched your deck, shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):All of your front row rear-guards with "Hero" in their card names get [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, if your Order Zone has a Base card, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], until end of that battle, this unit gets [Power]+15000, and if your Order Zone has three or more Base cards, it gets [Critical]+1.
flavorTextEN: You cannot save anything, if all you do is proclaim your justice.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), reveal the top five cards of your deck, put all Set Orders from among them into your Order Zone, and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, choose any number of Set Orders from your Order Zone, if you chose three or more cards with different card names, choose one of your rear-guards, [Stand] it, and if you chose five or more cards with different card names, [Stand] this unit, and this unit gets [Power]+10000/drive -2 until end of turn. Return all of the cards from your Order Zone chosen with this ability to your deck and shuffle it.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: The World is a Blue Research Lab
effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Eva" in its card name!
[AUTO]:When this card is put into the order zone, look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
[ACT](Order Zone)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1) & [Rest] three research cards in order zone], choose one of your [Glitter] units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: To know all of creation, heaven and earth, everything in existence.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When your rear-guard with "Monster" in its card name is placed, COST  [put a card with the same card name as that card from Order Zone on the bottom of deck], and that unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, if your Order Zone has a Research card, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and activate all of the effects below.
•If your Order Zone has three or more Research cards, choose up to one of your rear-guards with "Monster" in its card name, and put it into your Order Zone.
•Look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one unit card with "Monster" in its card name from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Don't worry, as I've created you to be perfect.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards with grade equal to or less than the number of Research cards in your Order Zone, and retire it.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your Order Zone has three or more Research cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: That scorching heat will burn down the frigid earth and white tranquil sky.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):All of your front row rear-guards with "B-Hero" in their card names get [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, if your Order Zone has a Base card, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], until end of that battle, this unit gets [Power]+15000, and if your Order Zone has three or more Base cards, it gets [Critical]+1.
flavorTextEN: You cannot save anything, if all you do is proclaim your justice.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Welstra" in its card name, COST  [retire this unit], search your deck or drop for up to one "Heavy Strike Cannon Fortress, Freischutz" or "Mobile Fortress of Obliteration, Freischutz Maximum", reveal it and put it into your hand, and if you searched your deck, shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: It is our duty to answer the needs of our customers.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one Set Order and reveal it, and if your order zone has a card with the same card name as that card, put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, choose two Set Orders with the same card name from your order zone. If you chose two cards, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The development of a nation is accelerated by the fervor born from entertainment.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When a Research card is put into your order zone, COST  [retire this unit], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: You need the resolve to lose something for a reformation.

effectEN: [ACT](VC)1/Turn :If your soul has "Blue Deathster, Sora Piriod", COST  [put a Strategy card from order zone into soul], draw a card, until end of turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and "[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :At the end of the battle this unit attacked, if its attack hit a vanguard or you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], [Stand] this unit, and it gets drive -1 until end of turn.".
flavorTextEN: The boy drives the blue reaper that rends the sky and rids all evil.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC) Generation Break 2 (Active if you have two or more face up G units in total on your (VC) or G zone):When any locked card is unlocked, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card.
[AUTO](VC):When your G unit Stride during your turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & lock a rear-guard], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, lock it, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. (Locked cards cannot do anything. They are unlocked and turned face up as [Stand] at the end of their owner's turn)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], search your deck or drop for up to one grade 3 set order, reveal it and put it into your hand, and if you searched your deck, shuffle your deck.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When a set order is put into your order zone, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
(After a set order is played, put it into your order zone.)
[AUTO]:When this card is put into your soul from your order zone, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, choose one of your vanguards, and until end of turn, it gets "[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, all of your front row units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, if your Order Zone has two or more cards, you may draw a card. If you do, choose a card from your hand, and put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: Those arms can split the earth, and swallow civilizations.

effectEN:
(After a set order is played, put it into your order zone.)
[AUTO]:When this card is put into your soul from your order zone, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, choose one of your vanguards, and until end of turn, it gets "[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, all of your front row units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+2000 for each of your Dragontree markers on (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC) Generation Break 2 (Active if you have two or more face up G units in total on your (VC) or G zone):During your turn, if any player has a locked card, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand for the cost of Stride, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards with grade equal to or less than the number of Research cards in your Order Zone, and retire it.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your Order Zone has three or more Research cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: That scorching heat will burn down the frigid earth and white tranquil sky.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one Set Order and reveal it, and if your order zone has a card with the same card name as that card, put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, choose two Set Orders with the same card name from your order zone. If you chose two cards, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The development of a nation is accelerated by the fervor born from entertainment.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), your opponent chooses a card from their drop, and imprisons it in your Prison.
[CONT](RC/GC):If two or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+10000, and for the battle this unit attacked, when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC/GC):If your opponent's drive check or damage check revealed a trigger unit this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000/[Shield]+10000.
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and perform all of the following.
•Until end of turn, this unit gets "Boost", and [Power]+2000.
•COST  [Remove a [Over] trigger from drop], and this unit gets "[CONT](Back Row RC):All of your front row units get [Power]+5000." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :At the beginning of your attack step, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose up to two of your rear-guards with "Armed Arms " in each of their different card names, and attach  them to this unit. (Move the attaching units to (VC) as [Stand]. They cannot attack, the attached unit gets their [Power] and abilities continuously, and they are moved to (RC) as [Rest] at the end of turn)
[AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, choose up to one of the units attached to this unit, and move it to an open (RC) as [Stand]. (It is no longer attached after being moved)
flavorTextEN: System all green― Activate! Armed Arms!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1) card with "Seraph" in its card name], your opponent chooses two cards each from their hand, rear-guards, and soul, and imprisons them in your Prison.
[CONT](VC):During your turn, all of your front row units get [Power]+5000 for every two of your opponent's cards imprisoned in your Prison. If ten or more cards are imprisoned, all of your front row units get [Critical]+1.
flavorTextEN: If I could just arrest you, this turmoil would be quelled.

effectEN:
(This card cannot be in your main deck)
[Stride]-Stride Step-COST  [Choose one or more cards with the sum of their grades being 3 or greater from your hand, and discard them], and Stride this card on your (VC) from face down. (When you stride, your original vanguard becomes a heart card, and this unit gets that card's [Power] and card name. At the end of the turn, return this unit face up)
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & turn a card from G zone face up], choose any number of yours and your opponent's locked cards, and unlock them. Choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each card unlocked with this ability.
flavorTextEN: The will to resist against fate was the power that held the fate of the world.

effectEN:
(This card cannot be in your main deck)
[Stride]-Stride Step-COST  [Discard a grade 3 card with "Messiah" in its card name from your hand], and Stride this card on your (VC) from face down. (When you stride, your original vanguard becomes a heart card, and this unit gets that card's [Power] and card name. At the end of the turn, return this unit face up)
[AUTO](VC) Generation Break 2:When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose any number of any player's locked cards, and unlock them. If you unlocked a card, choose the same number of your rear-guards as the number of cards unlocked by this ability, [Stand] them, and until the end of turn, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000, and this unit gets [Critical]+1.
flavorTextEN: Thus, the light of creation cleansed all sins and paved the path towards paradise.
Even if it’s a battleship, there's no way to resist once it is caught.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: In the storm of pure darkness, they suddenly appeared.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN: Why have they appeared. The truth behind it has not been answered.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Insanity can sometimes be a weapon.
Those with regrets left in this world become servants aboard Regrain.
A fictional character for the purpose of admonition. Fictional up until yesterday, that is.

nameEN: Source Dragon Deity of Blessings, Blessfavor
effectEN:
(You may only have one [Over] trigger in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, remove that card, draw a card, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn! If revealed during drive check, activate its additional effect!)
Additional Effect - Draw a card! Choose one of your units, it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! All of your front row units get [Power]+10000! If your damage zone has the same number of cards as your opponent’s or more, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!
flavorTextEN: Nature. Its bounty is countless, its wonders immeasurable.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.)
flavorTextEN: Borrowing power from the land and seas, Sylvan Horned Beasts bend nature to their will.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Overflowing feelings. Sparkling admiration.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, draw a card! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: I have confidence in my ability to identify delicious fruits.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: Dialogue through horns. The initiative remains firmly in their hands.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four [Heal] triggers in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn! Then, if the number of cards in your damage zone is equal to or more than your opponent's, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!)
flavorTextEN: Please, go ahead. There's no need to stand on ceremony.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Discard three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one card with the same grade as your vanguard or lower from your drop, and call it to (RC). If your vanguard is "Sylvan Horned Beast King, Magnolia", choose up to two cards instead of one.
flavorTextEN: In order to survive, join forces and pool your knowledge.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Here! One more crown as a present ♪

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: They won't have it their way, not happening on my watch!

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Isn't it such great weather? Let's go on a walk~♪

effectEN: Additional Effect - Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn!
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: If that means I can protect everyone......!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (GC), if your opponent's attacking unit has attacked two or more times this turn, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle. (Active if this battle is its second attack this turn or more)

[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your opponent's attacking unit has attacked two or more times this turn, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle. (Active if this battle is its second attack this turn or more)
flavorTextEN: A phantasmal garden where happiness blooms, that evildoers cannot reach.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if the attacking unit's [Critical] is 2 or greater, and its [Critical] is increased by a non-trigger effect ability or its original [Critical] is 2 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: I think I may have created soap bubbles that won't pop!

effectEN: (You may only have up to four [Heal] triggers in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn! Then, if the number of cards in your damage zone is equal to or more than your opponent's, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!)
flavorTextEN: The graceful tones that heal are carried upon a gentle breeze.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: The sight of those giving their all will help the audience relax.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, draw a card! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: It'll be bad if you get hungry during the performance.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Let's give it our all with today's parade too!

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: The tones that resonate with the world tree give life to the planet.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)

flavorTextEN: Push, push, push through.

effectEN: Additional Effect - Draw a card! Choose one of your units, it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! All of your front row units get [Power]+10000! If your damage zone has the same number of cards as your opponent's or more, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!
flavorTextEN: There's nothing to worry about, everything is here.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN:
Let's dance energetically to the rhythm♪
Leave all the unhappy thoughts behind♪
Split, into two.
The wind carries tomorrow on it.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Make a pledge to a distant day. The sound of the waves that holds resolution.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your vanguard's grade is less than your opponent's vanguard's grade, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.

Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card with a grade equal to or greater than your vanguard, reveal it and put it into your hand, and discard the rest.

[CONT]:This card is also regarded as "Aspiring Maiden, Alana".
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 1 <Bug>, you get a "The King of Beetles, Mushiking Cabinet" crest.

Look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card with grade greater than or equal to your vanguard from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and discard the rest.
flavorTextEN: The gates to limbo open, and the hands of demons reach out in envy of the living.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your other rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll end you myself. Only as a last resort.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll be your guide within the ship. No idea where we are currently though.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):When you would exchange or move rear-guards during the main phase, you may also move them along rows.
[CONT](RC):Your units in front of this unit cannot be chosen by your opponent's effects.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, COST  [bind this unit], choose an order card from your bind zone, and put it into your hand.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [discard a card from your hand], choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: To survive tomorrow, we must prepare now.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (2)], reveal the top card of your deck, if it is a unit card, call it to (RC), and if it isn't, put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: It'll be fine. We have reliable comrades with us.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, you may discard the top five cards of your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Bind this card, choose up to two order cards from your drop, and put them into your hand.
flavorTextEN: Never giving up. That should have been you.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: I'll definitely protect them. They are lives that finally sprouted after all.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], draw two cards, choose up to one order card from your hand, discard it, and if you did not discard, choose two cards from your hand, and discard them.
[CONT](RC):If you played an order this turn, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: They are the monsters from folktales. Hidden in fantasies, they tempt feelings of people.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If you played an order this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), the next time you would Alchemagic an order and play it this turn, reduce that cost by Counter Blast (1). (Reduce from the total cost. Does not Counter Charge even if it becomes negative)
flavorTextEN: Hunting the heads of rogues, a rogue-like being that is scarier than rogues.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Choose a card with grade equal to or less than your vanguard from your drop, call it to (RC), and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: O wandering souls, I shall grant you a new purpose for existence.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, if it is the third battle of this turn, COST  [retire this unit], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one unit card from among them, call it to a back row (RC), and discard the rest. That called unit cannot be moved to another (RC) until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Sylvan Horned Beast, Lattice", you may reveal the top card of your deck. If it is a grade 2 or less unit card, call it to (RC), and if it isn't, put it into your soul.
[CONT](Back Row RC):During the battle this unit attacked, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Step by step, getting closer to that which you admire.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks or boosts, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your rear-guards.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT]:This card cannot be ridden, and can only be called to the back row center (RC).
flavorTextEN: Cowardly but powerful. It continues to work hard in the shadows of the lord.

effectEN: [CONT]:This card cannot be ridden, called or moved to the front row
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Bind this unit], choose an order card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you played an order this turn, COST  [dicard an order card from your hand], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: All living things are lively feed to them.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, COST  [bind this unit], choose an order card from your bind zone, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: The wails of the past bring forth the tragedy once more.
